name: Advanced IP Scanner – User Configuration (Installer & Portable)
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for commonly abused tools with specific registry footprints: PsExec (temporary service key on target), FileZilla (FTP exfiltration), MEGASync (cloud exfiltration with autorun), Advanced IP Scanner (writes even as portable; operational history including scanned IP ranges), and NetSupport Manager (RMM abused as RAT). Includes artifact tips and companion file artifacts.
description: [Advanced IP Scanner] Created by BOTH the installer and the portable version after first use. Stores UI preferences including locale (UI language), and operational history in the \State subkey. The locale value may indicate the threat actor's native language.
forensic_value: Critical: this key is created even by the PORTABLE version — no installation required. Proves Advanced IP Scanner was executed regardless of install method. The locale value hints at operator language/nationality. Per Hunt & Hackett research, APS is the preferred network scanner in multiple APT toolboxes.
